nasb.text: the land which the Lord conquered before the congregation of Israel, is a land for livestock, and your servants have livestock.”

esv.text: the land that the Lord struck down before the congregation of Israel, is a land for livestock, and your servants have livestock.”

cnv.text: 就是耶和華在以色列會眾面前攻取的地，是可牧放牲畜的地，你僕人也有牲畜。”

ccb.text: 这些耶和华为以色列会众攻取的地方适于放牧，而仆人们有许多牲畜。
